what.title: What is Playback Theatre
what.hook: You tell a story — actors bring it to life on stage.
what.quote: This is a meeting place where people see and understand each other, where you can come as you truly are, share your individual, unique story which will be listened to with such attention that they will try to find a resonance within themselves, and based on that shared feeling, transform it into a stage performance.

steps.title: We listen
steps.description: A member of the audience shares a real story from their life

steps.title: We play
steps.description: The story is performed right there by actors, with live music

steps.title: We return (playback)
steps.description: We ritually return this story to the teller, and it becomes a shared experience

opening.doubt: I initially thought it would be difficult...
opening.resolve: But people show us trust, share their stories, and by doing so bring the theatrical process to life.
opening.author: Tsisia Cholokashvili

quotes.text: It was my first time and I couldn't imagine something like this was possible. I wanted to both cry and laugh.
quotes.author: Audience member

quotes.text: This is not just theatre. This is something profoundly human.
quotes.author: Audience member

quotes.text: I was filled with emotions all week after that evening.
quotes.author: Audience member

quotes.text: Now I realize this is exactly the place I needed so much, and from today I'll be at every performance.
quotes.author: Audience member

founder.title: About the Center

timeline.text: Playback Theatre founded (Jonathan Fox & Jo Salas)

founder.quote: This space represents the convergence of my two professional experiences: professional theatre and psychotherapy practice. For me, Playback Theatre is a transition from big, structured and predetermined theatre to a small, authentic space built on human encounter, spontaneity and genuineness, where a person can be who they truly are. It is in this human, living relationship that I see the main value of Playback Theatre.

performance.title: Experience Playback
performance.note: Attendance is free. As an expression of gratitude, audience members typically leave a 20-40₾ donation — that's how this theatre exists. If you can't, just come — your presence matters 🤍

courses.title: Courses
courses.intro: We don't just perform — we teach. We're always looking for new people who want to become Playback Theatre actors.

organizations.title: For Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Playback Theatre as a team experience
organizations.intro: Offer your team an extraordinary experience. Playback Theatre strengthens trust, empathy, and communication, what conventional trainings cannot achieve.

services.name: Exclusive Performance
services.description: A private performance for your organization: your team's stories on stage

services.name: Workshop
services.description: A practical seminar on listening, spontaneity, and teamwork skills

services.name: Training Program
services.description: A customized program tailored to your organization's needs

team.title: Team
team.groupText: Today the center is home to 14 people from diverse professional backgrounds, united by Playback Theatre.

closingQuote.text: Every performance is exclusive. When a performance begins, we never know what it will be like, who will share a story, what kind of stories we will hear, how the play will develop, and how the invisible thread of the performance will weave itself, what we call the "narrative web."
closingQuote.author: Tsisia Cholokashvili

ethics.title: Code of Ethics
ethics.intro: Playback Theatre follows the ethical principles of CPT (Center for Playback Theatre):

items.title: Respect
items.text: We respect each person, their experience and their story. We honor the wholeness of each individual and act so as never to diminish them.

items.title: Inclusivity
items.text: We are open to any story. We strive to amplify voices that are often unheard in society.

items.title: Spontaneity
items.text: We allow events to unfold naturally, without pre-planning or manipulation.

items.title: Competence
items.text: Our team continuously develops competence through learning, practice, and supervision.

items.title: Social Responsibility
items.text: We understand Playback Theatre's potential to promote social justice. We use art as an instrument of change.

items.title: Integrity
items.text: We act with honesty and transparency. Our words and actions are consistent.

donation.title: Support
donation.text: Playback Theatre needs support beyond performances — we continuously invest in raising our skills, invite trainers from leading European Playback theatres, and develop this space. Your donation makes all of this possible.
